calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-21-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lee Kaster appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court noted that no one appeared to object. The court also noted that there was an issue regarding presumption of revocation under Probate Code 6124. Mr. Kaster stated that he has nothing to add. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated August 19, 2020 is admitted to probate. Eve Marie Brody is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Lee. Not reported.
